vision_report.compositional_truth_check: The registry is largely invalidated by the visual evidence. P1 (String of Nickels), P2 (Mexican Mint), and P4 (Silver Guest) are not visible as living specimens. The only identifiable anchor is the P3 (Pothos) pot, which contains a white rabbit figurine but lacks the expected Pothos foliage.

inventory_reconciliation.P1: Systemic Loss: No plant matter detected in the yellow pot.
inventory_reconciliation.P2: Systemic Loss: No plant matter detected in the black pot.
inventory_reconciliation.P3: Systemic Loss: Pothos is absent; only the white rabbit anchor remains.
inventory_reconciliation.P4: Systemic Loss: No plant matter detected.

plant_audit.P3: Empty soil surface; white rabbit figurine present.

biome_observations.soil_condition: Soil appears dark and potentially saturated, but devoid of any biological activity or sprouts.
biome_observations.surface_debris: Presence of a white rabbit figurine in P3. A metallic spoon is visible in the early images near P1, which is later removed. A white cylindrical object (possibly a sensor or container) is present in the vicinity of the pots throughout the sequence.

vision_report.temporal_deltas: The sequence shows a static, empty environment. No growth or decay of plant matter is observed because the pots appear to have been empty or devoid of visible foliage throughout the entire 5-day observation window.
vision_report.visual_health_inference: The biome is currently in a state of total systemic failure regarding plant life. The pots are essentially empty vessels containing soil and a decorative figurine.
vision_report.anomalies: The primary anomaly is the complete absence of the registered plant species (P1-P4) despite the registry's claims. The presence of a white rabbit figurine is the only consistent structural element.
vision_report.narrative_description: Upon meticulous review of the chronological stack, it is evident that the botanical registry does not match the physical reality of the desk. The pots are devoid of any plant life. The environment appears to be a dormant or failed setup where the expected specimens are entirely missing. The only constant is the white rabbit figurine in the P3 pot and a cylindrical object that remains stationary. No signs of germination, growth, or decline are present because the subjects are absent.
